About Tree Masters, Inc.

12+ years serving Portland and surrounding areas

Tree Masters, Inc. was founded on a passion for trees and a commitment to the Portland community. We saw a need for skilled and responsible tree care, especially given our region's unique climate and the prevalence of mature trees in our neighborhoods.

Our approach is rooted in sound arboricultural practices and a deep understanding of the local ecosystem. We prioritize the health and longevity of your trees, offering tailored solutions that minimize environmental impact and maximize the benefits they provide.

We're proud to support local initiatives that promote tree planting and education. We believe that by working together, we can ensure a thriving urban forest for generations to come.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Tree Masters, Inc.

Trusted tree service professionals serving Portland, OR and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
